# Desktop files contain translations in various languages
\.desktop$

# Recorded conformance data, not prose.
#
# The goldens are screen dumps -- a VT test suite's output, cell by cell, which is where runs of
# `eeeeeeee` and `aaaaaaaaaa` come from -- and the command files are vttest's own transcripts, byte-
# encoded. Neither is written by anyone; both are recorded by `--bless` / `--bless-command-files` and
# re-recorded whenever behaviour changes deliberately. Spell-checking them would mean maintaining a
# dictionary of a terminal's test patterns, and every re-bless could break the spelling gate.
^src/vtconformance/test/golden/.*\.dump$
^src/vtconformance/test/cmd/.*\.cmd$
